name: towerforge
description: Build, validate, simulate, balance, script, and package TowerForge games from Codex.

interface.shortDescription: Design and ship TowerForge games with validated local tools
interface.longDescription: TowerForge connects Codex to the active local .tdproj workspace. Inspect schemas and content, author maps and TowerScript, validate changes, run deterministic simulations and balance reports, bind assets, and produce release builds through guarded project-aware tools.
defaultPrompt: Audit this TowerForge project and report release blockers
Balance the selected mission and validate the result
Create a map and tileset plan for this TowerForge game
